# LLMs.txt for jobdex.1mindlabs.org

## Website Overview
JobDex is an open-source global index of startup hiring by city. It aggregates job listings from hundreds of ATS providers (Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby) and plots them on an interactive world map, making it easy to discover where startups are hiring across any city or region.

## Site Structure
- Home Page (`/`): Landing page with project overview, globe visualization, and links to the map
- Map Page (`/map`): Interactive world map showing startup job locations powered by OpenStreetMap and Leaflet

## Key Features
- Aggregates startup jobs from Greenhouse, Lever, and Ashby hiring boards
- Interactive world map with city and company-level job pins
- Search and filter by city, role, industry, country, and region
- REST API for programmatic access to job, company, and city data
- No login required - fully open and public
- Self-hostable via Docker

## Contact Information
- GitHub: https://github.com/areebahmeddd/jobdex
